conservative.name: Empty Pockets
conservative.requirements: 4 favour, Guile trained. You invoke this blessing in response to your person being searched, and may not Curry Favour (as you have no time)

success.description: Ranald hides your valuables from prying eyes. One item on your person with an encumbrance of 2 or less is not turned up by the search, no matter how thorough it is

boon.description: Additional items equal to the number of generated by this check may be hidden by this blessing, provided the total encumbrance is not greater than the limit

bane.description: You suffer 1 stress, and 1 additional stress if the search is long or arduous

chaosStar.description: You owe Ranald for his help. Suffer to all actions until you donate 1/10th of your wealth to a needy person or cause
